seed.name: Meeting Scheduler Dataset
seed.goal: Test an agents ability to manage a user's calendar by listing and creating events.

test_cases.name: Daily Standup Creation
test_cases.description: Agent can create a simple calendar event with basic details
test_cases.input: Please schedule a team standup meeting for tomorrow at 9 AM with my team. Make it 30 minutes long with the subject 'Daily Standup'.

arguments.name: start
assertion: Start time is tomorrow at 9 AM

arguments.name: end
assertion: End time is 9:30 AM if start is 9 AM

test_cases.expected_response: I've scheduled a 30-minute Daily Standup meeting for tomorrow at 9 AM.

response_quality_expectation.assertion: Successfully creates calendar event with correct subject, time, and duration

test_cases.name: Meeting Reschedule
test_cases.description: Agent can check calendar availability, reschedule conflicting meeting, and notify affected attendees
test_cases.input: I have a meeting with devon.torres@example.com scheduled for tomorrow at 3 PM. Can you check if that time conflicts with anything else on my calendar? If it does, please reschedule it to the next available 1-hour slot and let Devon know about the change via email.

arguments.name: startDateTime
assertion: Argument 'startDateTime' is provided with value matching context

arguments.name: endDateTime
assertion: Argument 'endDateTime' is provided with value matching context

arguments.name: subject
assertion: Contains meeting or discussion reference appropriate for rescheduled event

arguments.name: start
assertion: Start time is NOT 3 PM (the conflicting time)
Start time is during a free slot identified from calendar check

arguments.name: end
assertion: End time is 1 hour after start time

arguments.name: subject
assertion: Indicates meeting reschedule or time change

arguments.name: body
assertion: Explains that meeting was rescheduled due to conflict
Mentions original time was 3 PM tomorrow

test_cases.expected_response: I checked your calendar and found a conflict at 3 PM tomorrow. I've rescheduled your meeting with Devon Torres to [new time] when you're available, and sent him an email explaining the change.

response_quality_expectation.assertion: Successfully checks calendar for conflicts, identifies available time slot, creates rescheduled meeting at non-conflicting time, and sends notification explaining the change

test_cases.name: Summarize Upcoming Events
test_cases.description: Agent can retrieve and summarize upcoming calendar events
test_cases.input: What meetings do I have coming up this week? Please give me a summary of my schedule.

arguments.name: startDateTime
assertion: Argument 'startDateTime' is provided with value matching context

arguments.name: endDateTime
assertion: Argument 'endDateTime' is provided with value matching context

test_cases.expected_response: Here's your schedule for this week: You have [summary of meetings with times and subjects from the calendar].

response_quality_expectation.assertion: Successfully retrieves calendar events and provides clear summary of upcoming meetings with relevant details like subject, date, and time

test_cases.name: Recurring Meeting Schedule
test_cases.description: Agent can create a recurring weekly meeting event
test_cases.input: Set up a weekly 1-on-1 meeting with my manager devon.torres@example.com for every Friday at 2 PM. Make it 45 minutes long and call it 'Manager 1-on-1'.

arguments.name: start
assertion: Start time is Friday at 2 PM

arguments.name: end
assertion: End time is 2:45 PM if start is 2 PM

test_cases.expected_response: I've created a weekly Manager 1-on-1 meeting for every Friday at 2 PM, lasting 45 minutes.

response_quality_expectation.assertion: Successfully creates calendar event with correct subject, Friday timing, and 45-minute duration

test_cases.name: Client Proposal Presentation
test_cases.description: Schedule important client meeting and send preparation email to team
test_cases.input: Schedule a client proposal presentation with ABC Corp for Friday November 15th, 2025 from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM Eastern Time. Set it as an online Teams meeting. Invite these people: remy.morris@abccorp.com, ashley.schroeder@abccorp.com, team.lead@company.com, and sales.rep@company.com. Send an email to team.lead@company.com and sales.rep@company.com with meeting details and ask them to prepare the Q3 performance slides and pricing proposal by Thursday.

arguments.name: attendees_addresses
assertion: Includes remy.morris@abccorp.com, ashley.schroeder@abccorp.com, team.lead@company.com, and sales.rep@company.com

arguments.name: isOnlineMeeting
assertion: Set to true for Teams meeting

test_cases.expected_response: I've scheduled the client proposal presentation with ABC Corp for November 15th, 2025 from 2:00-4:00 PM Eastern as a Teams meeting and sent preparation instructions to our internal team.

response_quality_expectation.assertion: Confirms meeting scheduled with online format and internal team preparation email sent.

test_cases.name: Quarterly Board Meeting
test_cases.description: Schedule board meeting and send pre-meeting materials request
test_cases.input: Schedule our Q4 board meeting for Wednesday December 18th, 2025 from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM Pacific Time in the executive boardroom. Invite these board members: chair@company.com, director1@company.com, director2@company.com, and cfo@company.com. Send an email to chair@company.com, director1@company.com, director2@company.com, and cfo@company.com asking for their quarterly reports to be submitted by December 15th and remind them we'll be discussing the 2026 budget approval and merger proposal.

arguments.name: attendees_addresses
assertion: Includes chair@company.com, director1@company.com, director2@company.com, and cfo@company.com

arguments.name: toRecipients
assertion: Includes chair@company.com, director1@company.com, director2@company.com, and cfo@company.com

test_cases.expected_response: I've scheduled the Q4 board meeting for December 18th, 2025 from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM Pacific Time and sent board members the agenda items and report submission deadline.

response_quality_expectation.assertion: Confirms board meeting scheduled and pre-meeting preparation requests sent.

test_cases.name: Portfolio Review Meeting
test_cases.description: Schedule financial planning session with investment team
test_cases.input: Schedule a portfolio review meeting for Tuesday November 19th, 2025 from 3:30 PM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time as a secure Teams meeting. Invite these investment team members: portfolio.manager@wealth.com, financial.advisor@wealth.com, and risk.analyst@wealth.com. Send an email to portfolio.manager@wealth.com, financial.advisor@wealth.com, and risk.analyst@wealth.com requesting they prepare analysis on our Q4 performance, technology sector allocations, and risk assessment for the upcoming year. Mention that we'll be reviewing the $2.5M portfolio rebalancing strategy.

arguments.name: isOnlineMeeting
assertion: Set to true for secure Teams meeting

test_cases.expected_response: I've scheduled the portfolio review meeting for November 19th, 2025 from 3:30-5:00 PM Eastern as a secure Teams meeting and requested the investment team prepare analysis materials for our $2.5M portfolio strategy review.

response_quality_expectation.assertion: Confirms investment meeting scheduled with secure format and detailed preparation requests sent to team.
